Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: Rita and Chris get involved when a wealthy over-sexed Palm Beach businessman puts out a contract on a smalltime loser who is partially responsible for the death of a woman in the businessman's well-paid harem.
Video.title: Wild Card

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?

Video.summary: After Reno saves Rikki Yeager from a psychotic bounty hunter, his attempt to turn her over goes up in smoke when the plane sent for their transport explodes in an obvious ambush plot.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 2

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn

Video.summary: When Reno stands trial for the murder of Buzzy Burrell, his quest for justice is complicated by Lt. Dutch Dixon who plans to insure that Reno never makes it to court alive.
Video.title: The Trial Of Reno Raines

Video.summary: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down "the King" to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.
Video.title: The King And I

Video.summary: Reno goes to the aid of his Karate Master when one of the master's former pupils attacks a San Francisco councilwoman.
Video.title: Black Wind

Video.summary: An investment advisors murder implicates his wife, a mistress and his personal trainer.
Video.title: Dead Weight

Video.summary: The romance between a devious 17 year old girl and a doctor gets out of hand when she murders his wife.
Video.title: Kid Stuff

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: Reno's freedom appears within reach when he goes after his nemesis Lt. Dutch Dixon who is wanted for the murder of his own partner.
Video.title: Dutch On The Run
